# Feature: Screenshot editor undo / redo

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-12 -->

## Intent

Screenshot annotation editor (draw, text, crop) gets undo/redo toolbar controls and keyboard shortcuts so users can revert mistakes without closing the editor.

## Preconditions

- Visual inspector enabled; capture chip opens screenshot editor
- Editor implementations: guest (`packages/guest`), inspector-app, SDK overlay

## Happy Path

- [ ] Toolbar shows **Zurück** and **Vor** icon buttons immediately left of **Speichern**
- [ ] After drawing a stroke, **Zurück** removes the last stroke; canvas redraws
- [ ] After undo, **Vor** restores the removed stroke
- [ ] **Cmd+Z** (macOS) and **Ctrl+Z** (Windows/Linux) trigger undo when focus is not in a text textarea
- [ ] Buttons disabled when undo/redo stack is empty
- [ ] Save and Abbrechen still work unchanged

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Undo while typing in text box uses native textarea undo (editor shortcut does not steal focus)
- [ ] Crop rectangle and text box add/move are undoable
- [ ] Opening editor starts with undo disabled until first edit

## Regression

- [ ] `npm run checks` passes
- [ ] Guest bundle rebuilt (`npm run bundle --workspace=@tauri-plugin/visual-editor`)

## Assumptions

- Redo via **Cmd+Shift+Z** / **Ctrl+Y** is optional bonus alongside **Vor** button
- History capped at 50 steps per session

## Implementation Notes

- Guest: `screenshot-editor-history.ts`, undo/redo toolbar + `Cmd/Ctrl+Z` in `screenshot-editor.ts`
- React parity: `inspector-app` + `sdk` `ScreenshotEditor.tsx`, shared history helpers
- Icons: `ICON_UNDO` / `ICON_REDO` (guest), `IconUndo` / `IconRedo` (React)
- History: snapshot before each draw/crop/text/drag mutation; max 50 steps
- Clippy fix in `reload.rs` (needless borrow) included from prior work
